title: Super Simple Voice Radio
description: A super simple voice radio addon for Simple Voice Chat
body: This is a simple handheld radio addon created for the [Dimensional Ascension modpack](on CurseForge). It is an addon for the [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) mod. Use the keybind or right click with the radio in your hand to speak over a radio's frequency. The keybind will look for the first radio in your inventory, starting with your hotbar and then going left to right, top to bottom. If you want an updated or more feature-complete version of a radio mod, check out [CodinGlitch's Simple Radio](https://github.com/CodinGlitch/SimpleRadio) for 1.20.X+. To use the radio, you need to hold it in your hand and hold right click, or use the keybind (default Grave). The keybind will look for the first radio in your Curios inventory, then your hotbar, then your inventory, from left to right, top to bottom. To change the radio's frequency, you need to hold it in your hand and use the configure radio keybind (default C) Features: * a handheld radio * a way to change that radio's frequency * keybinds * curio support Requires Curios API to work.
